steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The first sentence establishes harsh environmental exposure. The second asserts the sculpture remains in good condition. These seem contradictory, and the transition must reconcile them.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”That said,” expresses concession — it acknowledges the harsh exposure just mentioned while introducing the contrasting fact that the sculpture remains preserved.
  • A wrongly frames causation (harsh conditions causing preservation)
  • C merely adds information
  • D overstates opposition
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
